beats.purpose: Make the lingering-permission metaphor instantly legible.
beats.picture: Empty club at dawn; one discarded translucent wristband pulses beside confetti.

beats.purpose: Show that the session ended while the permission remained.
beats.picture: The abandoned wristband unlocks an empty access gate.

beats.purpose: Move from metaphor to the real product before 12 seconds.
beats.picture: Scanner ring fills frame and match-cuts to the real WalletBrief address field.

beats.purpose: Prove arbitrary-address wallet inspection on Monad.
beats.picture: Real WalletBrief search, balances, transaction count, latest block, and approval scan.

beats.purpose: Prove the safe owner-only simulation boundary.
beats.picture: Real approval row, current allowance, owner match, revoke simulation, and signature boundary.

beats.purpose: Resolve the metaphor with verified no-active state and the product promise.
beats.picture: Real no-active state and explorer proof; wristband light goes dark; deterministic end card.
